overall.description: A ship bridge simulation depicting nighttime navigation through open waters during a storm. The view shows the vessel's bow cutting through dark seas with operational navigation displays visible overhead, punctuated by a sudden lightning flash illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with forward deck view

agents.ego_description: Operating the ship's navigation systems while maintaining course through open waters at night

entered.detail: Chart plotter display showing coastal navigation map with vessel position
Radar display with rotating sweep showing surrounding contacts
Sonar and depth finder display showing underwater terrain
Forward deck of the vessel with safety railings and deck lighting
Metal safety rails along the port side of the bridge wing
Metal safety rails along the starboard side of the bridge wing
Dark open water visible ahead of the vessel bow

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady nighttime navigation scene from a ship's bridge. Three navigation monitors display chart, radar, and sonar data while the vessel moves forward through dark waters. The bow is visible through the bridge windows with safety railings on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge during electrical storm

events.description: Bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface and ship bow through the bridge windows

agents.ego_description: Continuing to operate the vessel through stormy conditions after the lightning strike

segments.scene_description: The segment continues the nighttime navigation with a brief but intense lightning flash at the start that momentarily brightens the entire scene. The ship maintains steady forward motion through the stormy seas, with navigation displays continuing to show operational data.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady nighttime navigation sequence from a ship's bridge that is momentarily interrupted by a sudden atmospheric discharge. It begins with a view of the vessel moving forward through dark waters, with three navigation monitors displaying chart, radar, and sonar data above the bow and safety railings. As the ship maintains its course through the stormy seas, a brief but intense lightning flash suddenly erupts, momentarily brightening the entire bridge and the surrounding ocean. The scene then settles back into the deep shadows of the night, with the operational displays continuing to glow as the vessel pushes steadily ahead.
